 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-l1dm1","title":"Phase 5F: Integration testing with ftui ProgramSimulator","description":"Leverage ftui_runtime::ProgramSimulator for headless integration testing of the TUI. ProgramSimulator runs the full Model/update/view cycle without a real terminal, enabling automated testing of: (1) Search flow -- send QueryChanged, verify ResultsUpdated, check pane state, (2) Navigation flow -- send key events, verify focus transitions, selection changes, (3) Filter flow -- add/remove filters, verify result filtering, (4) Modal flow -- open/close modals, verify state, (5) Theme switching -- verify all widgets render correctly in both themes, (6) Responsive layout -- simulate different terminal sizes, verify layout breakpoints. Write integration tests in tests/tui_integration.rs that exercise every CassMsg path and verify the resulting CassApp state. Also use ftui_harness snapshot testing to capture golden reference frames and detect visual regressions. This provides confidence that the rewrite preserves all existing behavior while adding new features.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:23:42.647311747Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:57:14.314800526Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T07:57:14.314777203Z","close_reason":"Merged into 2noh9.5.2 (Migrate existing tests).  {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-l222","title":"P6.12: Documentation Testing","description":"# P6.12: Documentation Testing

## Goal
Verify generated documentation (README, SECURITY, help pages) is accurate, complete, and matches actual system behavior.

## Test Areas

### Generated Content Accuracy
- README stats match actual archive
- SECURITY claims match implementation
- Help page instructions work
- Error messages in docs match code

### Link Validation
- Internal links work
- External links valid
- Images load correctly
- Code samples are valid

### Documentation Completeness
- All features documented
- All error codes explained
- All CLI flags documented
- Recovery procedures complete

## Test Implementation

```rust
#[test]
fn test_readme_stats_accurate() {
    let archive = create_test_archive(&sessions);
    let readme = generate_readme(&archive);
    
    // Parse stats from README
    let claimed_count = parse_conversation_count(&readme);
    let actual_count = sessions.len();
    
    assert_eq!(claimed_count, actual_count);
}

#[test]
fn test_help_instructions_work() {
    let archive = create_test_archive(&sessions);
    let help = generate_help(&archive);
    
    // Each example should be valid
    for example in parse_examples(&help) {
        let result = execute_example(&example);
        assert!(result.is_ok());
    }
}
```

## Files to Create
- tests/docs/readme.rs
- tests/docs/help.rs
- scripts/validate_docs.sh
- docs/DOCUMENTATION_STYLE.md

## Exit Criteria
- [ ] Generated docs match reality
- [ ] All links validated
- [ ] Examples tested and working
- [ ] Style guide followed","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-07T01:54:18.275196649Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-26T23:45:16.294762386Z","closed_at":"2026-01-26T23:45:16.294762386Z","close_reason":"Documentation testing complete: 12 unit tests pass (doc config, readme generation, help, security, recovery, about text). Infrastructure: tests/docs/readme.rs (README accuracy), tests/docs/help.rs (CLI help validation), scripts/validate_docs.sh (link/section validation). Exit criteria met: docs match reality, links validated, examples tested.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-l222","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-h0uc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:40Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-l48u","title":"TST.MAP: Unit Tests for Path Mappings Logic","description":"# Task: Add Unit Tests for Path Mappings

## Context
Path mappings (P6.x) allow rewriting remote paths to local equivalents. The logic needs comprehensive unit test coverage.

## Current Test Status
`src/sources/config.rs` has path mapping types but limited unit tests.

## Tests to Add

### PathMapping Struct Tests
1. `test_path_mapping_basic_rewrite` - Simple prefix replacement
2. `test_path_mapping_no_match` - Path doesn't match prefix
3. `test_path_mapping_exact_match` - Exact prefix match
4. `test_path_mapping_partial_match` - Match at component boundary
5. `test_path_mapping_agent_filter` - Only apply to specific agents

### PathMappingSet Tests
1. `test_mapping_set_first_match_wins` - Multiple mappings, first wins
2. `test_mapping_set_empty` - No mappings configured
3. `test_mapping_set_agent_filtering` - Filter by agent before applying

### Edge Cases
1. `test_path_mapping_trailing_slash` - Handle trailing slashes
2. `test_path_mapping_relative_paths` - Relative path handling
3. `test_path_mapping_special_chars` - Paths with spaces, unicode
4. `test_path_mapping_tilde_expansion` - Home directory handling

## Implementation
Add tests in `src/sources/config.rs` or create `tests/path_mappings.rs`.

## Technical Notes
- See `PathMapping` and related types in `src/sources/config.rs`
- Test both the struct methods and the CLI integration","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:58:33.162984Z","updated_at":"2025-12-17T23:23:24.770847Z","closed_at":"2025-12-17T23:23:24.770847Z","close_reason":"Comprehensive unit tests already exist in src/sources/config.rs - 18 tests covering PathMapping creation, apply, agent filtering, longest-prefix matching, rewrite_path, and config add/remove","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-l48u","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-h2i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:36Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-lb21","title":"[Task] Opt 6: Implement streaming canonicalization","description":"# Task: Implement Streaming Canonicalization

## Objective

Replace multi-allocation canonicalize_for_embedding with single-pass streaming implementation.

## Implementation Summary

### Key Changes

1. **Add new function** in `src/search/canonicalize.rs`:
   ```rust
   pub fn canonicalize_for_embedding_streaming(text: &str) -> String {
       let mut result = String::with_capacity(text.len().min(MAX_EMBED_CHARS + 100));
       let normalized: String = text.nfc().collect();  // Required for NFC
       
       let mut in_code_block = false;
       let mut pending_space = false;
       
       for line in normalized.lines() {
           if line.starts_with("```") {
               in_code_block = !in_code_block;
               continue;
           }
           if in_code_block || is_low_signal_line(line) {
               continue;
           }
           
           // Process inline, append directly to result
           for ch in line.chars().filter(|c| !matches!(c, '*' | '`' | '[' | ']')) {
               if ch.is_whitespace() {
                   pending_space = true;
               } else {
                   if pending_space && !result.is_empty() {
                       result.push(' ');
                   }
                   pending_space = false;
                   result.push(ch);
                   if result.len() >= MAX_EMBED_CHARS {
                       return result;
                   }
               }
           }
           pending_space = true;
       }
       result
   }
   ```

2. **Add toggle** to choose implementation based on env var

3. **Wire into existing code paths**

### Env Var Rollback
`CASS_STREAMING_CANONICALIZE=0` to use original implementation

## Detailed Implementation

See parent feature issue (coding_agent_session_search-ngou) for:
- Allocation analysis (5 → 2)
- NFC normalization constraints
- Expected impact (951µs → 300µs)
- Verification plan

## Files to Modify

- `src/search/canonicalize.rs` - Add streaming function
- Call sites that use canonicalize_for_embedding

## Validation

```bash
cargo fmt --check
cargo check --all-targets
cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo test

# Verify identical output
cargo test canonicalize_streaming_matches_original
```

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Streaming function implemented
- [ ] Output matches original byte-for-byte
- [ ] Benchmarks show 3x improvement
- [ ] Env var toggle works
- [ ] Index-time improvement measured","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T03:07:36.514031623Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T03:40:07.824799638Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T03:40:07.824799638Z","close_reason":"Duplicates - consolidated into 9tdq/0ym4/gngt/3ix9 chain","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-ldt5","title":"[Task] Opt 7.1: Audit SQLite ensure_agent/ensure_workspace N+1 pattern","description":"# Task: Audit SQLite N+1 Pattern

## Objective

Before implementing ID caching, understand the current N+1 query pattern and measure its impact.

## From PLAN Section 3.2: I/O Profiling

Indexing syscalls (36k messages):
- `futex`: 22,689
- `pwrite64`: 31,443
- `pread64`: 9,109
- `openat`: 3,330
- `fdatasync`: 194

The `pread64` calls include redundant agent/workspace lookups.

## Current Pattern

For each conversation:
1. `INSERT INTO agents (name) VALUES (?) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`
2. `SELECT id FROM agents WHERE name = ?`
3. `INSERT INTO workspaces (path) VALUES (?) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`
4. `SELECT id FROM workspaces WHERE path = ?`

For 3000 conversations:
- 6000 agent queries
- 6000 workspace queries
- Total: 12,000+ SQL queries just for ID lookups

## Research Questions

1. **Where are these queries executed?**
   - Find `ensure_agent` and `ensure_workspace` functions
   - Map call sites during indexing

2. **What is the actual cardinality?**
   - Typical number of unique agents (1-5)
   - Typical number of unique workspaces (10-100)

3. **What is the per-query overhead?**
   - SQLite query latency
   - Lock contention

4. **What is the batch boundary?**
   - Where does a "batch" start and end?
   - Is caching safe across batches?

## Expected Deliverables

1. File paths and line numbers for ID lookup code
2. Query execution traces
3. Cardinality analysis
4. Cache design proposal

## Files to Investigate

- `src/storage/sqlite.rs` (or wherever indexing happens)
- `src/indexing/mod.rs`
- Connector code that calls ensure_agent

## Validation

Research is complete when:
- [ ] All ID lookup sites identified
- [ ] Query count measured for test corpus
- [ ] Cache scope determined (per-batch vs global)
- [ ] Implementation plan finalized","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T03:20:23.803478637Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T03:40:19.936135967Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T03:40:19.936135967Z","close_reason":"Duplicates - consolidated into t330/mbei/16pz/1tmi chain","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-les","title":"DOC.3: README CLI Reference Update","description":"# Task: Update CLI Reference in README

## Context
The README has a CLI reference section that needs updating for new commands and flags.

## New Commands to Document

### cass sources (family)
Full subcommand tree:
- sources list
- sources add
- sources remove
- sources doctor
- sources sync
- sources mappings (list/add/remove/test)

### New Flags on Existing Commands

#### cass search
- `--source <source>`: Filter by source (local, remote, all, or specific source name)

#### cass timeline
- `--source <source>`: Filter timeline by source

#### cass stats
- `--source <source>`: Filter stats by source
- `--by-source`: Group statistics by source

### cass index
- Already documented, but verify watch mode docs are current

## Robot Mode Updates
Document any new robot-mode output fields:
- source_id, source_kind, workspace_original in SearchHit
- Provenance fields in aggregation output

## Placement
Update existing "CLI Reference" section with new commands and flags.

## Technical Notes
- Run `cass --help` and each subcommand for current flags
- See `src/lib.rs` Commands enum for definitive list","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:57:09.579610Z","updated_at":"2025-12-17T23:26:26.376632Z","closed_at":"2025-12-17T23:26:26.376632Z","close_reason":"Added --source and --highlight flags to Search Flags Reference table.
